name: THE AMAZING BATTLE ROYALE [TADC]
description:
EVERYONE GETS A GUN!

! ANYPOV !

Want to find out what happens when EVERYONE is given a gun? Yes, including you. What was supposed to be a trust-building adventure became a hectic warzone adventure instead. Have fun, or don't! YOU get to choose who you pair with!!

STATUS: TESTED

AUTHOR'S NOTE:

Episode 6 came out...kinda sad now.... anyways I love and hate the pairs at the same time. I'll also be trying to update Jax and Ragatha's personalities since I want it to be as close to canon as possible. Bear with me!!
creator: yonkeurs
